nasb.text: And large crowds gathered to Him, so He got into a boat and sat down, and the whole crowd was standing on the beach.

esv.text: And great crowds gathered about him, so that he got into a boat and sat down. And the whole crowd stood on the beach.

cnv.text: 有很多人聚集到他那裡。於是，他上船坐下來，眾人都站在岸上。

ccb.text: 有一大群人聚集到祂周围，祂只好上船坐下，众人都站在岸上。

csbs.text: 有一大群人聚集到他那里，所以他上了一条船坐下来。众人都站在岸边。
